title: K-200 Comms System Interface Control Document v3.0 (Rev C)
text:
# K-200 Comms System Interface Control Document

Document number: MD-DOC-471-C. Revision: C. Type: ICD. Author: Priya Nair. Created: 2023-06-01. Last modified: 2025-02-28. Status: Released.

## Change History
- Rev A: 900MHz FHSS baseline, P-1125 (2023-06-01)
- Rev B: Diversity antenna system added (2024-03-01)
- Rev C: AES-256-GCM encryption layer added, radio P-1125→P-1126, P-1127 FPGA module (2025-02-28, per ECN-322)

## §3 Radio Subsystem — P-1126 Enhanced

Current radio: FreeWave Enhanced Dual-Band (P-1126 Rev B). Frequency: 900MHz / 2.4GHz FHSS. Data rate: 2Mbps. Output power: 1W. Range: 15km at 1W. The P-1126 replaced P-1125 (500kbps) to accommodate the bandwidth overhead of AES-256-GCM encryption. Change authority: ECN-322.

## §4 Encryption — P-1127 FPGA Module

All command and telemetry traffic is encrypted with AES-256-GCM before transmission by the P-1127 FPGA encryption module (Lattice iCE40, hardware implementation). The FPGA module sits between the datalink controller (P-1121) and the radio (P-1126). Session keys are derived via ECDH on power-cycle, with 60-minute rotation. Implementation: SRC-018 (encryption_handler.c). GCS protocol stack: SRC-024 (gcs_ui_backend.py).

Security requirement source: Customer contract security addendum, KES-203, penetration test MD-SEC-2024-11. Design review: WIKI-071.

## §5 Protocol — see DOC-472

Detailed protocol specification in DOC-472 (Comms Protocol Specification Rev B).
